text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa asks Trainer Kiryuin and me to
take part in a promotional event for the URA
Finale.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Things don't quite go to plan, and we end up
performing a mini-concert on stage together in
place of our trainees...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...but in any case, we succeed in spreading the
word about the event.
